if (!configurationValues.TryGetValue(senderConfigKey, out string senderQueueName) ||
    string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(senderQueueName))
{
    _logger.LogWarning(
        "DIA notification email creation skipped because sender queue configuration was not found. LogId: {LogId}, SenderConfigKey: {SenderConfigKey}.",
        logId,
        senderConfigKey);

    return;
}

if (!configurationValues.TryGetValue(recipientConfigKey, out string recipientEmails) ||
    string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(recipientEmails))
{
    _logger.LogWarning(
        "DIA notification email creation skipped because recipient email configuration was not found. LogId: {LogId}, RecipientConfigKey: {RecipientConfigKey}.",
        logId,
        recipientConfigKey);

    return;
}
